description: Composition Teal striped top made of 100% cotton, has cap sleeves, a mandarin collar with a V-neckline, a buttoned placket and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron if required arrow woman caters to every fashionista. This top is a a tried-and-true favourite with a slouchy silhouette that flatters your curves. Pair it with form-fitting denims and kitten heels. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
